tiles.title: Safe Areas to Base In
tiles.description: Stay on I-Drive, Lake Buena Vista, or near Universal for comfort, security, and walkability.

tiles.title: Smart Transport Tips
tiles.description: Rideshare at night, verify your driver, and don't walk long, dark stretches between properties.

tiles.title: Emergency Support
tiles.description: Know when to call 911 or the Orange County Sheriff non-emergency line, and use park guest services.
